runTitle: Dashboard AI app-shell navigation targeted QA

left side navigation rail collapse while AI sidebar is open
AI sidebar auto-close on embedded AI page entry
AI sidebar top-right reopen on embedded AI page
/dashboard mobile header logo and AI CTA spacing

artifacts.label: Embedded dashboard AI assistant page

completedImprovements.title: 좌측 app shell navigation에서 AI 어시스턴트 항목 제거
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright: desktop side nav contains 개요/서버/알림/로그/토폴로지만 노출

completedImprovements.title: 우측 AI 사이드바가 열릴 때 좌측 navigation rail 축소
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright: AI sidebar open state에서 aside 64px, labels width 0/opacity 0

completedImprovements.title: AI 사이드바 사용자 resize 동작 검증
AI 전체 화면을 별도 standalone 대신 dashboard embedded page로 통합
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright: /dashboard/ai-assistant에서 Chat/Reporter/Analyst 기능 버튼 렌더링, standalone back chrome 미노출

completedImprovements.title: AI 전체 페이지 진입 시 사이드바 자동 닫힘 및 상단 버튼 재열림
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright: full handoff 후 dialog 0개, top-right CTA 재클릭 후 dialog open 및 URL 유지

completedImprovements.title: 모바일 헤더 로고와 AI CTA 겹침 방지
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright 390x844: logo rect right 262px, AI CTA left 273px, overlap false

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard/AI shell targeted Vitest suites pass

notes: No global KeyG/g keyboard handler found in dashboard or AI sidebar code paths; only Escape/Tab/Enter handlers were present in the searched app/component scope.
Browser QA reported 0 console errors. Console warnings were local dev/HMR diagnostics and not product runtime failures.
Vercel production QA is intentionally skipped for this run because these source changes have not been deployed.
